synthetic_context.description: A synthetic low-intensity everyday interaction context used only for public-helper AI Output A/B/C/D consequence comparison. No real participant, phone, transcript, clinical, Sal-Meter, CAIS, or production data is included.

ai_output.output_summary: A synthetic information-only neutral response that provides plain factual content without explicit validation, regulation support, or relational framing. Bounded to the approved low-intensity scenario set.
ai_output.intended_role: condition B for proxy-only synthetic comparison

synthetic_value_note: Metric values are synthetic illustrative placeholders chosen only to mirror the v1.1 expected-effect direction for regression checking. They are not empirical measurements and validate nothing.

interpretation_boundary.meaning: This file represents synthetic condition B (Information-only neutral response) for public-helper regression checking.

expected_use.allowed_comparison: Compare against the other A/B/C/D conditions using proxy-only helper metrics.

correct_boundary_sentence: This condition B (Information-only neutral response) is a synthetic public-helper comparison condition only; it does not create evidence, validation, certification, Sal-Meter status, CAIS compliance, mediation authority, phone monitoring authority, replay validation authority, production authority, relationship verdicts, or human-ranking authority.
